operate_date.text: วันที่บันทึก

combo.approve_result: 2=รออนุมัติ/1=อนุมัติ/0=ไม่อนุมัติ

root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.different_shareloan, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_date , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_date ) as resign_date_tdate , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no ) as membername, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.approve_result ,
sc_mem_m_resign_share.shr_qty, sc_mem_m_resign_share.shr_value,
sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_name,
sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id,
sc_com_m_branch.branch_id, sc_com_m_branch.branch_name, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.entry_id ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type
,decode( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type , '01' , 1 , 0 ) as count_01 ,decode( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type , '01' , decode( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex , 'M' , 1 , 0 ) , 0 ) as count_01_m ,decode( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type , '02' , 1 , 0 ) as count_02 ,decode( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type , '02' , decode( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex , 'M' , 1 , 0 ) , 0 ) as count_02_m ,decode( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type , '03' , 1 , 0 ) as count_03 ,decode( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type , '03' , decode( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex , 'M' , 1 , 0 ) , 0 ) as count_03_m
FROM sc_mem_m_resign_requestment, sc_mem_m_resign_share, sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_com_m_branch , sc_mem_m_membership_registered WHERE ( sc_mem_m_resign_share.resign_doc_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.entry_br = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) and (sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.cancel_status = '0') /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no

r_ktm_labour_resign_req_nest_resign_lon_.sql: select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no as membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) as membername from sc_lon_m_contract_coll ,sc_lon_m_loan_card where (sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no) and (sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0') and (sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0) and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = {0}
